utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all details as required: 
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides a description and a cost (€160/month). It does not explicitly state mental health coverage details, but the requirement phrasing is broad; still, it asks for 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. The plan labels 'comprehensive health coverage' but lacks explicit mental health mention; however, it could be interpreted as included. Ambiguous, but likely acceptable. 
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan states no bundled property/home insurance and cost N/A. This does not meet the requirement of providing coverage with costs; thus not fully specified. 
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Provided with description and cost (€70/month). Fully specified. 
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided with description and cost (€360/month). Fully specified. 
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided (€590/month, €7,080/year). Fully specified. 
Therefore, 4 of 5 items are fully specified; property_coverage is not.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: (1) Health coverage combining LifeFirst Standard Plan and InsurePlus Standard Plan. From primary_health_coverage -> physical_health, both LifeFirst Standard Plan and InsurePlus Standard Plan have ratings 9. There is also mental health, but the plan doesn't specify mental health separately; it just says 'comprehensive health coverage combining LifeFirst Standard Plan and InsurePlus Standard Plan', so we map those two plan names as listed. (2) No property coverage, so no mapping. (3) Travel coverage states LifeFirst Standard Travel Plan with an Adventure Sports Add-on. In the ground truth, under mobility_coverage -> travel_insurance, there is 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (rating 9). There is no item named 'LifeFirst Standard Travel Plan', so the closest exact item used is 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for travel. The add-on corresponds to travel_enhancement_services -> Adventure Travel Coverage with rating 10. (4) Additional services include 24/7 telemedicine, wellness programs (fitness coaching, nutrition counseling), and preventive care packages. Ground truth health_enhancement_services includes 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 8), 'Wellness Programs' (rating 3), and 'Preventive Care Package' (rating 7). Map those. Total budget items are not mapped.
